events.title: Bhakti Bliss Festival of Lights 2026
events.description: Three days of devotional immersion at Kenran Resort in the Tegalalang hills north of Ubud — Jeremy Sol's annual Bhakti Bliss Festival returns for its 2026 edition. The programme weaves Maha Bhakti Bliss Kirtan, ecstatic dance, cacao ceremony, and sacred transmission satsang across three evenings and days in a jungle resort setting that sits between the rice terraces roughly fifteen minutes north of central Ubud. Past editions have featured Margot Anand (Sacred Transmission and Satsang), live fire ritual, collective ecstatic movement, and the deep-field holding that comes from a residential festival container. Full 2026 programme and artist lineup not yet announced — early-bird Megatix tickets are live. Designated BaliSpirit Festival sister event, running since 2022.
events.short_description: Jeremy Sol's annual three-day bhakti festival at Kenran Resort, Tegallalang — kirtan, ecstatic dance, cacao ceremony, and satsang. BaliSpirit sister event, Aug 7–9.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Desa Kenderan, Kec. Tegallalang, Ubud, Bali 80552

events.title: Essence of Love — Weekly Tantra Couples Workshop
events.description: Every Saturday evening in Penestanan, Bara Studio opens the space above Karma House Chai for a two-hour couples practice in the Ananda Sarita tantra lineage. The format pairs partner meditations with conscious breath, eye contact, shared presence, and emotional vulnerability exercises — held in a clearly boundaried, non-sexual container by certified Tantra Essence facilitators. Each Saturday session is standalone: come once or build a practice across weeks. Spots are limited; advance booking required.
events.short_description: Weekly tantra couples workshop in Penestanan in the Ananda Sarita lineage — partner meditations, breath, and conscious presence. IDR 500k per couple, every Saturday 6:30 PM.
